ingredients.name: Water Stairs (Kaiyohaku Park)
ingredients.localName: 水の階段（海洋博公園）
ingredients.address: 424番地 Ishikawa, Motobu, Kunigami District, Okinawa 905-0206, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Water Stairs at Ocean Expo Park (Kaiyohaku Park) in Motobu, Okinawa are depicted in Episode 3 during the Hidden Inventory arc, as Gojo, Geto, and Riko explore the Okinawa oceanside park during their visit to the island.

ingredients.name: Wendy’s First Kitchen - Tachikawa From Chubu
ingredients.localName: ウェンディーズ・ファーストキッチン 立川フロム中武店
ingredients.entityContext: This Wendy's First Kitchen near Tachikawa Station is depicted in Episode 6 during the Hidden Inventory arc, part of the Tachikawa streetscape shown as Gojo and Geto arrive for a mission in the western Tokyo area.

ingredients.name: Yakiniku Moumokukuu
ingredients.localName: 焼肉 もうもうくうくう 渋谷店

ingredients.entityContext: This yakiniku restaurant on Dogenzaka appears in Episode 18 during the Shibuya Incident, part of the real-world storefronts that MAPPA carefully depicted as the battle engulfs the commercial streets of Shibuya.
